# SOP learnings (auto-generated)

Approved patch proposals from the **`sop_drift_review`** skill land here as `SOP-Patch-*.md`.

Source data: `.system/feedback/edit-log.jsonl` (operator corrections from the flywheel).

**Day 1 safety:** patches are proposals only — merge manually into `10-SOPs/` when ready.

## Run the review

Dashboard → **SOP Drift Review** → Run (default: last 20 corrections) → approve patch.
